subcodes.first_line: He saith: Were all who dwell in the realm of utterance to ponder upon this dream which We have shown forth in sleep, it would suffice them [3.5s]... ...Know verily that the veil hiding Our countenance hath not been completely lifted
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرمودند لو ملا البیان کلهم یتفکرن فی هذا النوم الذی اریناه فی المنام لیکفیهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
